text.message: You've got all the settle spots, don't complain lol. It was that or 52 for me
You have brick port access, how is that not better to take the 52
Single 5 isn't good enough for that
You and green both have cities, what's interesting
And you just gave another one up
greens literally about to cut my road right now
Blue you're going to get targeted just for the bad table talk
ive only said a few words lol
you and black are the ones blowing up chat
had to get rolls and burn cards on that
Why have you not blocked blue
Basically gave the game to blue by keeping that unblocked
tbh you prob want me on road since black on 6 with a dev we don't know, and 4 roads
You have 8 with a card, you can stop now
Not blocking blue is not smart
black you have a knight? gotta play for pacing on red
totally ok block reds just got a lot of devs so want you on army
What do you need for road, green
I have a brick I can give
5 devs, you're probably winning as long as the road fight continues
